name: Speak Cheezy
teaser: Got national press love for California-influenced sourdough pies. Feels like an American take on Pizzana.
review: They got some national press love for doing fun, California-influenced sourdough pies and I'm mostly in, even though I don't believe takeout operations should be cooking on wood. It feels like an American take on Pizzana, and that's a big compliment.
update: Pop-up turned permanent. Now one of the more reliable slice spots.
address: 3950 E 4th St, Long Beach, CA 90814, USA
hours: Monday: 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM · Thursday: 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM · Friday: 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM · Saturday: 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM · Sunday: 11:30 AM – 9:00 PM
